title: hypertelis pusilla
intro: Hypertelis pusilla, also known as dwarf sea lavender, is a small, perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The plant is rich in flavonoids, which contribute to its health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects that may help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. Hypertelis pusilla can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
